content_body: We loved this place to celebrate our anniversaries.  We will recommend it to all of our friends. The view is spectacular and the cabin is like something out of a travel magazine. All of the little touches let us know a loving family had their hands on the decor. We spent one night reading through the journal and corks and conjuring up stories about the authors! We loved sitting on the porch and drinking our morning coffee. We decided that Northern Georgia is the place to live and are making plans to move ASAP. Returning to Majestic Lake is definitely in our plans for the future. This is just what the doctor ordered - pure relaxation. My brother has a rental place in the Florida Keys. I am going to get him a journal and a "keys" companion to start using. Great idea!! All the best.
title: "Cabin is Like Something out of Travel Magazine"
